settings.label: Original Shopify shop domain
settings.info: Stamped auto-resolves the appkey from window.Shopify.shop. Must be the original Shopify myshopify.com domain for which Stamped was configured (even if the live store now runs on SHOPLINE).

settings.label: Public API key (fallback)
settings.info: Optional. Only used if auto-resolve via window.Shopify.shop fails. Starts with 'pubkey-'.

settings.label: Stamped store ID (sId) (fallback)
settings.info: Optional. Only used if auto-resolve via window.Shopify.shop fails.
